seoTitle: Devon Park vs Diamond Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Devon Park and Diamond Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Devon Park vs Diamond Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Devon Park and Diamond Valley.
heading: Devon Park vs Diamond Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Devon Park, Queensland and Diamond Valley, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Diamond Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Devon Park (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Devon Park or Diamond Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Devon Park has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Diamond Valley scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Devon Park scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Diamond Valley scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Devon Park or Diamond Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Diamond Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
